title: Peloton: Compelling Return to Growth
text: Peloton's Path to Sustained Growth and Profitability. Turnaround Momentum: Peloton is in the early stages of a compelling turnaround, supported by a strong Q3 earnings print and renewed top-line growth. The company posted fiscal third-quarter earnings results that beat Wall Street estimates on revenue, with the company touting growth in equipment sales, subscription revenue and profitability. Strategic Initiatives: The company is investing in personalization, commercial expansion, and product diversification (cardio plus strength, pilates expansion). These initiatives position the company for sustainable growth beyond just the pandemic-beneficiary narrative. Financial Improvements: Gross margin improvements and adjusted EBITDA growth demonstrate operational leverage as the company scales its business. Gross margin outlook of approximately 52.5% reflects an increase of 160 basis points year-over-year. Debt Management: The significant debt reduction and positive free cash flow generation provide financial flexibility for future investments. Analyst Outlook: According to 11 analysts, the average rating for PTON stock is Buy, with a 12-month stock price target of $7.61, representing an increase of 33.74% from the latest price. Forward-Looking Growth: The projected CAGR for revenue growth over the next 3 years is 2%, while the compound annual growth rate of operating income for the next 3 years is 62%.
